fixtures.spokenText: I attack the goblin. That is a seventeen plus five.
fixtures.focus: attack plus dice-result continuation in one recording

fixtures.spokenText: I attack the goblin. I move thirty feet.
fixtures.focus: two distinct actions in one recording

fixtures.spokenText: I attack the goblin, then I move thirty feet.
fixtures.focus: weaker action boundary using then-clause splitting
ambiguity should be preserved when multiple targets exist
non-action chatter should produce no actionable result
